overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through foggy, neon-lit urban streets at night. The scene transitions from a narrow commercial alley with Japanese signage and food vendors to a wide, hazy intersection with holographic advertisements and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit commercial alley with food vendors

events.description: passing close by a muscular tattooed NPC walking in the opposite direction
passing a female NPC standing near the vending machine

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow neon-lit alley, passing by NPCs and food stalls

notable_agents.action: muscular man with tattoos and white tank top walking toward camera then passing by
woman standing near the eye-symbol vending machine looking at her device

entered.detail: large circular illuminated sign with cat-like character hanging above the alley
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging above the walkway
tall vertical neon signs with Japanese characters in pink and blue
piles of trash and discarded items along the left wall
vending machine with glowing circular eye symbol and teal lighting
stacked cardboard boxes outside a shop entrance
open food stall counter with items displayed and warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, neon-lit commercial alley at night. Red paper lanterns and a large circular food sign hang overhead while various NPCs occupy the space—a muscular man passes by in the opposite direction, and a woman stands near a distinctive eye-symbol vending machine. The ground is littered with debris and cardboard boxes, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban roadside with parked cars and holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting the covered alley into the open foggy street with visible traffic
passing a maintenance worker sweeping the sidewalk with a broom

agents.ego_description: walking along the foggy roadside sidewalk, passing parked cars and a maintenance worker

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow reflective vest sweeping the sidewalk with a long broom

entered.detail: tall street lamp illuminating the foggy road ahead
dark sedan parked along the curb with red taillights visible
yellow and black striped bollards separating sidewalk from road
large floating holographic billboards visible through the fog above the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley onto a foggy urban roadside. The scene opens up to reveal parked cars, street lamps piercing through the haze, and large holographic advertisements floating in the distance. A worker in a reflective vest sweeps the sidewalk as the character passes by the striped road bollards.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane road crossing with active traffic

events.description: stepping off the curb to begin crossing the multi-lane road
dark sedan passes by from left to right while crossing the first lane
second vehicle passes by from right to left while crossing the final lane

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane road while vehicles pass by through the thick fog

notable_agents.action: dark sedan with glowing red taillights driving past on the left side
vehicle with bright headlights approaching from the right through the fog

entered.detail: white striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane road through heavy fog. Vehicles with glowing lights pass by in both directions as the character navigates the striped crossing. The holographic billboards shift to the left side as the character moves forward into the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large foggy intersection with holographic billboards and curved modern architecture

events.description: entering the wide open intersection area with the large curved building becoming visible
white van drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive foggy intersection toward the large curved building with holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the foggy intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: orange traffic cone on the left side of the intersection
massive curved modern building facade with multiple holographic screens
yellow and white road lines marking the intersection lanes

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast, fog-filled intersection dominated by a massive curved building on the left covered in holographic advertisements. The visibility is low due to the thick fog, with street lamps creating diffuse glows. A white van passes through the intersection as the character continues walking across the marked asphalt toward the distant building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a vast, fog-shrouded urban intersection. It begins amidst the dense atmosphere of a narrow commercial corridor, passing red paper lanterns, food signs, and various pedestrians navigating a debris-strewn path. As the character emerges from the alley, the space opens onto a hazy roadside where street lamps pierce the fog and holographic advertisements begin to float in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto a striped crosswalk, moving through the flow of glowing vehicles while the holographic billboards drift to the periphery. Finally, the camera advances into a massive, fog-filled intersection dominated by a curved building covered in digital displays, with a white van passing through the diffuse glow of the streetlights.
